text: Sorry, not meaning to be offensive, but, that is one ugly-looking rendition of cute little Vibri. Might be that the eyes are different, or that I can see her mouth when it's closed, or that the ears are abnormally super wide. Maybe a combination of all of those. Maybe if those were a bit more accurate and that strange running animation was skipping instead (except for in this animation, I have never seen Vibri actually run. I've seen her skip so fast she might as well be running, but she wasn't really running), it might not be so... yeah...

text: Great animation as always Pennaz! Reminded me of this game! I remember seeing it around every once in a while on the internet, I never really knew exactly what it was. I always love a unique rhythm game, Gitaroo Man is probably my favorite one, apparently PS2 copies of it are rare nowadays and I found one at my Gamestop. I'm not sure that this game would work on my system though, I think some games need a product to run in the US if they're Japanese or PAL versions... Anyways, keep it up! ^_^
